creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to hrothgar.ofstingan from comment #0)

> … doesn't appear to be freeing memory properly when the programme quits. …

Via <https://bokut.in/freebsd-patch-level-table/#releng/13.1> for FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p3: 

<https://www.freebsd.org/security/advisories/FreeBSD-EN-22:23.vm.asc>

> Memory pages become unreclaimable

Please review this bug with the most recently packaged Chromium on FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p4.
